function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, resolved identity via canonical cast records, and used project canonical README records for involvement.
function.outcome_justification: `10_entities/cast/hanna.md` identifies Hanna Oberleitner (alias `hanna`) in direct Petra-related bureau-lead context; searching `/40_projects` for structured identifier `hanna` yielded one project canonical record, `40_projects/2026_04_21_studio_parts_library/README.MD`, which includes `entity.hanna` in linked_entities and names the project `Studio Parts Library`.
